label: FastAPI
description: Modern async API framework with automatic docs.

phases.label: FastAPI Basics
phases.description: Routes, type hints, and automatic documentation.

topics.label: Hello World & Uvicorn
topics.description: Create a FastAPI app and run with uvicorn. Automatic OpenAPI docs at /docs.

topics.label: Path & Query Parameters
topics.description: Typed path params and query params with automatic validation.

topics.label: Request Body (Pydantic)
topics.description: Define request/response models with Pydantic BaseModel. Automatic validation.

topics.label: Response Models
topics.description: response_model for output shape, status_code, and response classes.

topics.label: Automatic Documentation
topics.description: Swagger UI (/docs) and ReDoc (/redoc) generated from type hints.

topics.label: Dependency Injection
topics.description: Depends() for reusable dependencies — DB sessions, auth, pagination.

topics.label: Database (SQLModel/SQLAlchemy)
topics.description: Async database access with SQLModel or SQLAlchemy 2.0.

topics.label: Authentication (OAuth2/JWT)
topics.description: OAuth2 password flow, JWT tokens, and security dependencies.

topics.label: Middleware & CORS
topics.description: Add middleware for logging, CORS, and request processing.

topics.label: Error Handling
topics.description: HTTPException, custom exception handlers, and validation errors.

topics.label: Async/Await
topics.description: async def endpoints, async database queries, and httpx for async HTTP.

topics.label: Background Tasks
topics.description: BackgroundTasks for fire-and-forget work. Celery for heavy processing.

topics.label: Testing
topics.description: TestClient with httpx, pytest fixtures, and dependency overrides.

topics.label: Docker & Deployment
topics.description: Dockerfile, Gunicorn with Uvicorn workers, and production config.
